description: Verified header navigation in mobile viewport. Found incorrect routes for 'Portfolio' on the home page and 'Contact' on the 404 page, both leading to broken links.

issues.name: Incorrect route for Portfolio link on home page
issues.description: Expected: The "Portfolio" link should point to "/portfolio" on all pages. Actual: The "Portfolio" link in the header on the home page points to "/portfoloi" instead of "/portfolio", leading to a 404 error page.
reproductionSteps: Check the "Portfolio" link in the header.
Verify that the link points to "/portfoloi" instead of "/portfolio".
issues.expectedBehavior: The "Portfolio" link should point to "/portfolio" on all pages.
issues.actualBehavior: The "Portfolio" link in the header on the home page points to "/portfoloi" instead of "/portfolio", leading to a 404 error page.

issues.name: Incorrect route for Contact link on 404 page
issues.description: Expected: The "Contact" link should point to "/contact" on all pages. Actual: The "Contact" link in the header on the 404 error page points to "/contcat" instead of "/contact", which leads to another 404 error page.
reproductionSteps: Check the "Contact" link in the header.
Verify that the link points to "/contcat" instead of "/contact".
issues.expectedBehavior: The "Contact" link should point to "/contact" on all pages.
issues.actualBehavior: The "Contact" link in the header on the 404 error page points to "/contcat" instead of "/contact", which leads to another 404 error page.
